calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim ; Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Pamela A. Underwood In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Pamela A. Underwood, Esq., for Pettioner and moving party: People of the State of California

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion for terminating sanctions and an order striking claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntc And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Docs
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of The State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection and produce documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
